---
title: "PSTAT122_Final"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# randomizing assignments
set.seed(21)

text_settings <- c("black, small", "black, large", "red, small", "red, large")

treatments <- rep(text_settings, each = 4)

sample(treatments)
```

```{r}
# data
data <- read.csv("Final_Data.csv")

head(data)
```
